title: Editor Testing 1 - 60 Magnolia Bay
description: Please create this video for us
video_script:
Hey Emergent — updating the P0 plan with one more requirement: we need a clean announcements baseline too.

We are still in a strict P0 validation lane. No new features until core functionality is stable.

⸻

P0 PLAN (Do this in order)

Step 1 — Full Reset/UAT Baseline (CLEAR TICKETS + ANNOUNCEMENTS)

Before troubleshooting, we need a clean slate.

1A) Clear ALL tickets/requests + related data

Clear:
	•	Tickets/Orders/Requests
	•	Ticket messages/comments
	•	Notifications tied to tickets
	•	SLA/Escalation artifacts + escalation history (if tied to tickets)
	•	Pool assignment/history records (if stored separately)

(Optional) Export/backup first (CSV/JSON is fine).

1B) Clear ALL announcements

Clear:
	•	All announcements in the announcements system (including scheduled, active, expired)
	•	Any banner cache/state if applicable

Acceptance test (reset):
	•	System shows 0 tickets everywhere (My Tickets / All Orders / Pool views)
	•	Announcements list shows 0 announcements
	•	Banner shows NO announcement at all for every role (Admins included — admins should see everything, so if none exist, banner should be empty)

Only after this reset is done, move to Step 2.

⸻

Step 2 — Announcements: Single Controlled Test (DO NOT stack tests yet)

Now we do ONE announcement test only.

2A) Create a single test announcement

Create: TESTING 1
	•	start_at = now - 1 minute
	•	end_at = now + 60 minutes
	•	targeting = ALL USERS
	•	priority = default (or any)

Confirm:
	•	It appears in the announcements list
	•	It appears in the banner for ALL users (Admins included)

2B) If TESTING 1 works: CLEAR ANNOUNCEMENTS AGAIN

Immediately after confirming the banner works:
	•	Delete TESTING 1
	•	Confirm announcements list returns to 0
	•	Confirm banner shows NO announcement again for all roles (Admins included)

This proves the system works AND resets us for real manual testing.

Acceptance test (single test):
	1.	Zero announcements → banner empty
	2.	Create TESTING 1 → banner shows TESTING 1
	3.	Delete all announcements → banner empty again

⸻

Step 3 — Hand off to me for manual scheduling/UAT

Once Steps 1–2 pass, stop changes and let me take over.

I will:
	•	Schedule announcements manually
	•	Validate multi-announcement behavior (priority, scheduling, targeting) on my end

Important rule: before I start manual scheduling, the system must show zero announcements and the banner must be empty.

⸻

PAUSE / BACKLOG (Do NOT touch until P0 passes)

Move everything else to backlog until the above is confirmed:
	•	Email notifications validation / SMTP
	•	Pool notifications validation
	•	Reports validation
	•	Analytics, integrations, workflow preview, SLA policy templates, etc.

⸻

Please confirm once Step 1 (tickets + announcements cleared) is complete, then proceed with Step 2 (single TESTING 1 verification) and Step 2B (clear again).
